vBRIEFInfo.author: manual:opus-4.7
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-1015: Remove claudish routing in favor of direct ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (CLIProxy only where needed). Empirically scoped 2026-05-08 — see issue body Empirical findings section.

plan.title: Remove claudish routing in favor of direct ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (CLIProxy only where needed)
plan.author: manual:opus-4.7

references.label: PAN-964 (closing PR cargo-culted to claudish without isolating root cause)
PAN-752 (Gemini OAuth — gates the claudish-cleanup for Gemini)

narratives.Problem: claudish v7.0.3 wraps every non-Anthropic provider with prefix@model syntax. The wrapper exists because of an assumed Claude Code v2.1.121 model-name validator (PAN-964) — but empirical retest 2026-05-08 shows that validator does not exist; PR #996 cargo-culted everything to claudish without isolating the actual cause of the original 502. Five providers (Z.AI, Mimo, OpenRouter, MiniMax, Kimi) expose native Anthropic-compatible endpoints that work end-to-end with Claude Code via direct ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL. The claudish layer is also the reason --permission-mode auto had to be pinned to bypass (commit 0ad7af02f) — claudish cannot proxy auto upstream. Removing claudish for those five providers unlocks auto-mode for them.
narratives.Proposal: Flip Z.AI, Mimo, OpenRouter, MiniMax, Kimi to compatibility:'direct' with their native Anthropic baseUrls. Deprecate the OpenAI API-key fallback (Codex subscription via CLIProxy is the supported OpenAI path). Defer Gemini to #752 (Gemini OAuth) and either keep claudish gated to Gemini-only OR add a CLIProxy Gemini adapter. Then delete the claudish spawn branch, prereqs, install/sync flows, ProviderCompatibility union, and the bypass-mode pin. Recommended split: ship Wave 1 (5 direct-flips) + OpenAI-deprecate + Gemini-deferral as v0.8.21 alongside the DSP-leak fix. Cleanup waves follow in v0.8.22.

items.title: Z.AI / GLM: flip to direct ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL

narrative.Action: In src/lib/providers.ts, change PROVIDERS.zai: set compatibility: 'direct', add baseUrl: 'https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic'. Verified end-to-end with Claude Code v2.1.121 — claude --print --model glm-4.7 'pong' returns successfully through ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL routing. Remove zai entry from any prefix-routing branches in src/lib/agents.ts.

subItems.title: claude --print --model glm-4.7 'pong' succeeds end-to-end via ZAI_API_KEY

items.title: Mimo: flip to direct (baseUrl already configured)

narrative.Action: PROVIDERS.mimo already has baseUrl: 'https://token-plan-sgp.xiaomimimo.com/anthropic'. Just change compatibility from 'claudish' to 'direct'. Probe confirmed endpoint returns proper Anthropic-shape 401 'Invalid API Key'. If user has MIMO_API_KEY available, run live verification; otherwise note the gap in followup-issues.txt.

PROVIDERS.openrouter: set compatibility: 'direct', baseUrl: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1', authType: 'static'. Probe confirmed endpoint returns proper 401 'Missing Authentication header'. OpenRouter model IDs contain '/' (e.g. 'qwen/qwen3.6-plus:free') — verify Claude Code passes them through. Remove 'or@' prefix routing in src/lib/agents.ts.

PROVIDERS.minimax: set compatibility: 'direct', baseUrl: 'https://api.minimaxi.com/anthropic'. Probe confirmed proper Anthropic-shape authentication_error with request_id when key missing. MiniMax requires Authorization: Bearer (Claude Code converts ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN appropriately). Live verification deferred if no MINIMAX_API_KEY available.

items.title: Kimi: flip to direct with key-aware endpoint selection

narrative.Action: PROVIDERS.kimi: set compatibility: 'direct'. Two endpoints depending on key prefix: sk-kimi-* coding key -> https://api.kimi.com/coding/anthropic; moonshot platform key -> https://api.moonshot.ai/anthropic. Probe confirmed api.moonshot.ai/anthropic/v1/messages reachable. Implement key-prefix detection in getProviderEnv(). User has KIMI_CODING_API_KEY but is currently out of tokens — capture the quota-exceeded response as proof of authenticated reach.

subItems.title: Endpoint selection respects key prefix (coding vs platform)
claude --print --model kimi-k2.6 produces an authenticated response (or quota-exceeded, not auth failure)

items.title: OpenAI API-key path: deprecate (keep only Codex subscription via CLIProxy)

narrative.Action: Probe confirmed api.openai.com does NOT expose Anthropic-compatible /v1/messages. Recommendation: deprecate the oai@ API-key fallback. Codex subscription via CLIProxy is the supported OpenAI path. In src/lib/agents.ts getProviderEnvForModel(), when provider.name==='openai' and no Codex login, throw a clear remediation error pointing to (1) pan admin specialists codex login or (2) dashboard Settings Codex login. Update src/lib/openai-auth.ts to remove the API-key fallback. Update tests.

subItems.title: OpenAI API-key fallback path removed from src/lib/agents.ts
Clear remediation error when user has OpenAI key but no Codex subscription
Tests in tests/lib/agents-auth-routing.test.ts updated to single-path Codex routing

items.title: Gemini: wire CLIProxy adapter (option a chosen — no claudish)

narrative.Action: Course correction: user chose option (a). CLIProxyAPI v6.10.x already supports Gemini as a backend provider, so wire GOOGLE_API_KEY into the local CLIProxy sidecar, mark Google/Gemini as direct, and route Claude Code to CLIProxy via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN. No Gemini claudish carve-out remains.

subItems.title: Decision recorded: option (a), Gemini through CLIProxy, no claudish
CLIProxy Gemini auth bridge persists GOOGLE_API_KEY into CLIProxy configuration/credential state
PROVIDERS.google.compatibility === direct and Gemini model IDs include gemini-3-flash-preview
getProviderEnvForModel() emits CLIProxy ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/AUTH_TOKEN for Google
Live validation attempted for claude --print --model gemini-3-flash-preview pong

items.title: Remove claudish spawn branch from getAgentRuntimeBaseCommand

narrative.Action: After items above land, the claudish branch in getAgentRuntimeBaseCommand() in src/lib/agents.ts becomes mostly dead. If gemini-cliproxy-or-defer chose (b), narrow to fire only when provider.name==='google'. Also delete: getClaudishPrefix() entries for migrated providers, the auto-refusal throw added in commit 0ad7af02f for non-Gemini providers, and the bypass-mode pin once the branch shrinks. Verify the DSP-leak regression tests in src/lib/__tests__/permission-mode-leak.test.ts still pass — those invariants must hold under direct routing.

subItems.title: Claudish branch deleted (option a) or narrowed to Gemini-only (option b)
getClaudishPrefix() returns null/throws for migrated providers
Bypass-mode pin removed for direct-routed providers

items.title: Remove claudish from prereqs / install / sync flows

narrative.Action: If (a) chosen: remove claudish from src/lib/prereqs/registry.ts, src/cli/commands/install.ts, src/cli/commands/sync.ts. If (b): gate claudish prereq behind 'has Gemini' rather than always-required. Delete src/lib/openai-auth.ts claudish-backed paths now that OpenAI API-key path is deprecated. Verify pan install / pan sync runs cleanly on a fresh setup without claudish for non-Gemini users.

subItems.title: claudish either fully removed from prereqs, or gated to Gemini users only
openai-auth.ts cleaned of claudish-backed dead code
pan install / pan sync runs cleanly without claudish for non-Gemini users

narrative.Action: ProviderCompatibility = 'direct' | 'claudish' becomes either a single literal 'direct' (deletable) if all providers route direct, or stays as the union with only Gemini using 'claudish' under option (b). Delete ProviderCompatibility export, requiresClaudish(), getClaudishProviders(), and helpers if unused. Update inspector frontend src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/inspector/utils.ts to drop the claudish badge.

subItems.title: ProviderCompatibility union simplified or removed per gemini decision
Helpers removed or narrowed (no dead code)
No orphaned imports of removed types

narrative.Action: Files to revisit: tests/lib/agents-auth-routing.test.ts (just patched in commit aa3f64afc to pin permissionMode=bypass — most assertions about claudish spawn shapes become obsolete; rewrite to assert direct ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL spawn shapes). tests/lib/providers.test.ts (compatibility assertions). tests/lib/cloister/review-agent.test.ts (any claudish env assumptions). permission-mode-leak.test.ts must still pass — its invariants apply to direct routing too.

subItems.title: agents-auth-routing.test.ts rewritten for direct routing assertions
providers.test.ts updated to reflect new compatibility values

items.title: Quality gates: typecheck, lint, full test suite, build, smoke test

narrative.Action: Run npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm test (root + frontend), npm run build. Fix any type errors. Validate dashboard launches via pan up. Spot-check Settings → Providers page renders, then smoke-test claude --print --model glm-4.7 'pong' end-to-end through the new direct path. NEVER bypass hooks; if anything fails, fix the underlying issue.

subItems.title: npm run typecheck passes with zero errors
Smoke test: claude --print --model glm-4.7 'pong' succeeds via direct path

metadata.plannedBy: manual (Opus 4.7) — based on empirical provider probe 2026-05-08
decisionsRequired: gemini-cliproxy-or-defer: pick option (a) implement adapter now, or (b) defer to #752 — recommendation: (b)
openai-key-deprecate: confirm deprecation is acceptable (vs. adding adapter)
metadata.rollbackPlan: Each direct-flip item is independently revertable: re-set compatibility:'claudish' on the affected provider in providers.ts. The spawn-branch deletion is the riskier change; keep the previous claudish code path in git history for at least one release as a hot-rollback option.
metadata.validationEvidence: PAN-1015 issue body 'Empirical findings (2026-05-08)' section contains raw probe results.
